Localization.Description: A user connected to a host or is unable to connect to a host

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The VPN user {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} connected to host {event_src.host} via {protocol}
The VPN user {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} is unable to connect to host {event_src.host} via {protocol}. Reason: {reason}.
